publication_scope: govern public route names before deployment
govern public route stability and status vocabulary
govern public data files and future schema expectations
govern static artifact and future generated-artifact separation
govern base-path and domain portability expectations
govern future custom-domain and alternate-static-host readiness without configuring hosts
govern future static-to-live backend handoff routes without implementing a hosted backend
govern future live source probe policy without implementing probes or network calls
govern public claim traceability before public hosting

public_claim_source_policy.rule: No public claim without a repo source.

public_status_taxonomy.meaning: The referenced artifact or route exists in the current repo artifact.
The claim or data comes from committed recorded fixtures, not live systems.
The route or file is safe static demonstration material, not live backend behavior.
The item is named for planning but does not implement behavior.
The item is accepted as future work but is not implemented.
The item is intentionally out of the current milestone.
The item depends on an unmet prerequisite.
The item is not safe to expose in the current public-alpha posture.
The item was removed from the public contract.

route_stability_levels.meaning: May change while publication contracts are still pre-alpha.
Intended to persist, but still subject to review before stable status.
Durable public route or data contract; changes require deprecation.
Still present but scheduled for removal or replacement.
No longer present in the active public contract.

next_expected_milestones: Rust Query Planner Parity Candidate v0
Internet Archive Live Probe v0 only after explicit human approval
Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 or Signed Snapshot Format v0
notes: This contract supersedes the previous immediate Deployment Config Pack ordering.
GitHub Pages deployment mechanics consume these contracts rather than define public architecture.
The current static artifact remains public_site and is not renamed by this slice.
Static Site Generation Migration v0 adds site/ and site/dist, but public_site remains the current deployment artifact.
Generated Public Data Summaries v0 adds static machine-readable summaries under public_site/data and site/dist/data.
Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 adds static compatibility seed surfaces under public_site/lite, public_site/text, and public_site/files.
Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0 adds fixture-backed static resolver demo pages under public_site/demo and site/dist/demo.
Custom Domain / Alternate Host Readiness v0 adds domain/static-host readiness inventories, base-path portability docs, and validation without DNS, CNAME, alternate-host config, or backend deployment.
Live Backend Handoff Contract v0 reserves /api/v1 route families, capability flags, and error-envelope expectations without deploying a backend or making /api/v1 live.
Live Probe Gateway Contract v0 records disabled-by-default live probe source policy, limits, cache/evidence requirements, and operator gates without implementing probes or making network calls.
No provider backend configuration, live backend, or live source probe is added by this contract.
